hero_subtitle: SFTY connects wallet activity, risk alerts, and sanctions data into a unified transaction screening workflow that supports audit-ready decisions and case management for digital asset compliance teams.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Transaction screening depends on manual handoffs
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and inconsistent risk visibility when transaction screening outputs remain isolated across multiple providers. This fragmentation slows workflow coordination, weakens audit evidence, and complicates defensible compliance decisions within VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates wallet activity, provider risk signals, transaction data and review actions into one structured compliance workflow so VASPs can manage screening cases with consistent context and audit evidence.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to transaction screening decision
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals then routes alerts through reviews, cases, decisions and evidence to support structured screening workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One audit-ready control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects transaction screenings and wallet risk alerts into structured workflows, cases, decisions, and evidence for clearer compliance control and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs by structuring transaction and wallet risk signals into audit-ready evidence with controlled deployment and governance for bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for transaction monitoring teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance layer that connects wallet and transaction risk signals with provider outputs, enabling structured workflows from alerts to case management and reporting.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure transaction screening workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes and aggregates transaction alerts into structured cases, supports risk rule application, decision logging, and links source and destination-of-funds analysis within one repeatable workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready transaction evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves all case history, decision logs and related evidence to support audit-ready review and help demonstrate how transaction screening decisions were made.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing KYT and screening tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects with multiple KYT, blockchain analytics and sanctions screening providers, consolidating their outputs into one operational compliance environment.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT and screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT or screening providers but turns their outputs into structured reviews, decision records and evidence packages within your compliance workflow.
final_title: Turn transaction screening into structured workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects wallet activity, risk alerts and sanctions data into audit-ready cases and compliance evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
